message:
test(fcp-e2e): lifecycle and GC artifact bundle integration test

Adds offline_repair_artifact_bundle_captures_lifecycle_and_gc_evidence,
an async e2e test that exercises the full repair → lifecycle snapshot →
GC → transcript pipeline in a single controlled scenario.

The test creates a three-object zone (root → payload → expired) with
partial symbol coverage for the payload object, captures a lifecycle
snapshot showing degraded coverage, simulates repair by adding the
missing symbol, captures a post-repair snapshot confirming full
reconstruction, then runs GC with transcript to verify eviction of the
expired lease object.

Validates: root reachability, reconstruction feasibility before/after
repair, placement policy satisfaction, lease state classification,
GC decision reasons (RootCheckpoint, ReachableRef, LeaseExpired),
eviction count, and that the full artifact bundle serializes to JSON
for downstream debugging consumption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
